name: pactfi.get_pools
description: List PactFi AMM liquidity pools on Algorand with optional filters. Returns pool metadata, TVL, volume, and APR.

symbol.description: Filter pools containing this token symbol (e.g. ALGO, USDC, goBTC)

pool_type.description: Filter by pool type: CONST (constant product) or STABLE (stableswap)

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default 20)

response.description: Pool list with metadata, TVL, volume, and APR

name: pactfi.get_pool
description: Get detailed PactFi pool information by application ID. Returns on-chain reserves, fee configuration, LP supply, and API metadata.

response.description: On-chain reserves, fee configuration, LP supply, and API metadata

name: pactfi.get_quote
description: Get a swap quote from PactFi using constant-product AMM math. Computes expected output, fee, price impact, and minimum received after slippage.

fromToken.description: Token symbol to swap from (e.g. ALGO, USDC)

toToken.description: Token symbol to swap to (e.g. USDC, ALGO)

amount.description: Amount to swap in human-readable units (e.g. '100' for 100 ALGO)

poolAppId.description: Pool application ID (optional if fromToken and toToken are provided)

response.description: Quote with expected output, fee, price impact, and minimum received

name: pactfi.swap_txn
description: Build unsigned transactions to swap tokens on PactFi. Returns base64-encoded transaction group for signing via UluWalletMCP.

fromToken.description: Token symbol to swap from (e.g. ALGO, USDC)

amount.description: Amount to swap in human-readable units

poolAppId.description: Pool application ID (optional — auto-discovered from token symbols)

response.description: Base64-encoded transactions for signing via UluWalletMCP

name: pactfi.add_liquidity_txn
description: Build unsigned transactions to add liquidity to a PactFi pool. Returns base64-encoded transaction group for signing via UluWalletMCP.

primaryAmount.description: Amount of primary asset in human-readable units

secondaryAmount.description: Amount of secondary asset in human-readable units

response.description: Base64-encoded transactions for signing via UluWalletMCP

name: pactfi.remove_liquidity_txn
description: Build unsigned transactions to remove liquidity from a PactFi pool. Returns base64-encoded transaction group for signing via UluWalletMCP.

lpAmount.description: Amount of LP tokens to burn in human-readable units

response.description: Base64-encoded transactions for signing via UluWalletMCP
